sglang.title: Fix ignore_eos in the OpenAI ChatCompletions API
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: [Feature, Hardware] Enable SGLang on XPU GPUs via PyTorch
sglang.author: liangan1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Pytorch already support XPU device since 2.4 release and xpu is also supported in OpenAI Trition. So, it should works with the Trition attention backend in SGLang.  In this PR, We add 'xpu' device into SGLang.
Blocked issue: The vllm is only compatible with 2.3 now and he binary whl support for torc

sglang.title: Fix unit tests and type annotations
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Add an option to disable penalizer
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Add get_tokenizer function for Engine class
sglang.author: pjyi2147
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently Engine class missing get_tokenizer function, so decided to add one.
Modifications

Add get_tokenizer function.
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docst

sglang.title: Fix the batch_is_full check for jump-forward decoding
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: We need to set self.batch_is_full = False if there are jump-forward decoding requests. Otherwise, it does not accept new requests.

sglang.title: Simplify the event loop and expose `--num-continuous-decode-steps` as an argument
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Simplify the event loop
Expose --num-continuous-decode-steps as an argument to allow flexible tuning of this value.

vllm.title: [Misc][Installation] Improve source installation script and related documentation
vllm.author: cermeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to improve the python_only_dev.py script introduced in #8818:


Add _version.py file to avoid related warnings.


Add a flag --quit-dev to:

unlink package and source code
restore the original vLLM package from the backup.

This is useful when updating the wheel.


Update related document
